date. 

There are 12 monthly variables — where the 01 through 12 at the end of the variable name 
correspond with the month (e.g., 01 is January and 12 is December). Users must know the Part C 
contract number (PTC_CNTRCT_ID_XX) and plan benefit package (PTC_PBP_ID_XX) to determine the 
geographic market areas where the PBP was offered. Premiums may vary by market segment. 

This field is new starting with MBSF ABCD V2.
